backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Product, Order, and OrderItem types with a pre-seeded catalog of 14+ grocery products and order management logic including status tracking and time-based ordering.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (visual theme, homepage, catalog, cart, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of each component, hook, page, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, accent, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component handling client-side page routing across home, catalog, checkout, order-confirmation, and orders pages, while wiring together cart state, search, and the cart drawer.
frontend/src/components/CartDrawer.tsx: Slide-in Sheet drawer displaying cart items with quantity increment/decrement controls, item removal, delivery fee logic, and a checkout CTA button.
frontend/src/components/CategoryCard.tsx: Reusable button card component displaying a category image and label with active/hover styling and a click handler for category navigation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, quick links, category list, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/HeroBanner.tsx: Displays a full-width hero banner with a background image, headline, Shop Now button, and feature pills for delivery perks.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, search input, and a cart icon with item count badge.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component for a single product showing an emoji image, category badge, name, description, price, and an Add to Cart button with out-of-stock handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Custom hook managing local cart state with add, increase, decrease, remove, and clear operations, plus derived totals for item count and subtotal.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, handling AuthClient creation, login flow, identity persistence, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all products, products by category, all orders, and placing an order via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including colors, sidebar, and custom utility tokens.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a Tailwind class merger (`cn`), a price formatter (`formatPrice`), a category-to-image-path mapper, and a typed list of product categories.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with React Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: Product catalog page with category filtering, sort options, and search functionality that fetches all products and renders them as ProductCard components with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout form page that collects buyer name, delivery address, and delivery time slot, validates inputs, and submits an order via the `usePlaceOrder` mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page displaying a hero banner, category cards, and a featured products grid with loading skeletons, supporting navigation to the catalog with optional category pre-filter.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Order confirmation page that displays a success message, delivery details, itemized order summary with totals, and navigation buttons to continue shopping or view orders.
frontend/src/pages/OrdersPage.tsx: Displays a paginated table of all orders with status badges (pending, confirmed, delivered), formatted dates and prices, and a refresh button. Uses the `useGetAllOrders` hook and shows skeleton loaders or an empty state when appropriate.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Plus Jakarta Sans, Lora), OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, border radius scale, box shadows, and animation keyframes. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state for a grocery delivery app, including schema version, feature inventory with IDs and requirement mappings, required image assets, architectural notes, and known issues.
